title: PyMT_Proliferation-Tracing-and-Ablation
author: Zhao, Chuang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We employed a dual recombinase-mediated genetic system to genetically trace and ablate proliferating cells in a Polyoma Virus middle T antigen (PyMT)-induced spontaneous murine breast cancer model. We then applied single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) to unbiasedly compare the tumor ecosystems of the primary and relapsed PyMT tumors.
steps_raw: We employed a dual recombinase-mediated genetic system to genetically trace and ablate proliferating cells in a Polyoma Virus middle T antigen (PyMT)-induced spontaneous murine breast cancer model. We then applied single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) to unbiasedly compare the tumor ecosystems of the primary and relapsed PyMT tumors.
